description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job called build_image that runs in the default test stage. Use the docker:git Docker image and the docker:dind service. Configure the job to run only on the master branch. In the script, first log in to registry.gitlab.com with the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN, then build the image registry.gitlab.com/living-map/frontend-builder and tag it as latest, and finally push the image to the registry.
